sink_impls.notes: Blanket impl delegating all methods to inner S; enables &mut references to be used as Sink
Blanket impl delegating all methods to boxed S
Wraps an FnMut closure receiving UTF-8 decoded lines; only implements matched(); not used in production dispatch
Wraps an FnMut closure with lossy UTF-8 decoding; only implements matched(); not used in production dispatch
Wraps an FnMut closure receiving raw bytes; only implements matched(); not used in production dispatch
Implements matched/context/context_break/binary_data/begin/finish for human-readable grep-style output; produced by Standard::sink() and Standard::sink_with_path()
Implements matched/context/binary_data/begin/finish for structured JSON output; produced by JSON::sink() and JSON::sink_with_path()
Implements matched/binary_data/begin/finish for count/path/quiet summary modes; produced by Summary::sink() and Summary::sink_with_path()

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search
call_chain.notes: Public entry point; checks should_decompress/should_preprocess and dispatches to search_preprocessor, search_decompress, or search_path

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search_path (method)
call_chain.notes: Opens file at path, then delegates to standalone free fn search_path

call_chain.name: search_path (free fn)
call_chain.notes: Dispatch point: matches on Printer enum variants (Standard/Summary/JSON), calls sink_with_path() to instantiate StandardSink/SummarySink/JSONSink, then calls grep::searcher::Searcher::search_path

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search_reader (method)
call_chain.notes: Alternative path when caller provides a reader directly; delegates to standalone free fn search_reader

call_chain.name: search_reader (free fn)
call_chain.notes: Dispatch point: matches on Printer enum variants, calls sink() to instantiate Sink impls, then calls Searcher::search_reader

call_chain.name: Searcher::search_reader
call_chain.notes: Terminal call in grep-searcher crate; drives search loop, calling Sink::begin/matched/context/context_break/binary_data/finish on the concrete Sink instance

change_impact_map.change: New file: define CSV<W>, CSVBuilder, and CSVSink<'p, 's, M, W> structs with configuration, state fields, and helper methods mirroring standard.rs structure
impl Sink for CSVSink: required matched() writing RFC 4180 CSV rows; optional begin(), finish(), binary_data() as needed
Add pub use crate::csv::{CSV, CSVBuilder, CSVSink}; to expose new types in the crate public API alongside Standard/JSON/Summary
Add Csv(grep::printer::CSV<W>) variant to the Printer<W> enum
Add Printer::Csv(ref mut p) match arm in standalone search_path free fn; call p.sink_with_path(matcher, path) to obtain CSVSink and pass to Searcher::search_path
Add Printer::Csv(ref mut p) match arm in standalone search_reader free fn; call p.sink(matcher) to obtain CSVSink and pass to Searcher::search_reader
Add --output-format=csv flag (or reuse existing format flag); construct Printer::Csv(CSVBuilder::new().build(wtr)) and pass to SearchWorkerBuilder::build
